class_rogue.name: Rogue
class_rogue.description: Masters of stealth, deception, and precise strikes. Rogues specialize in finding vulnerabilities in their enemies and exploiting them with deadly efficiency.

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d8 (or 5) + your Constitution modifier per Rogue level after 1st

class_rogue.starting_equipment:
• (a) fine clothes, (b) leather armor, or (c) 10 gc
• (a) ranged simple weapon and 20 munitions or (b) shortsword
• (a) 2 melee simple weapons or (b) thieves' tools
• (a) burglar's pack or (b) explorer's pack

sub_rog_swashbuckler.name: Swashbuckler
sub_rog_swashbuckler.description: Focuses on the art of the duel and elegance of motion. Your confidence in combat is your greatest weapon.

feat_rog_expertise.name: Expertise
feat_rog_expertise.description:
• Choose two of your skill proficiencies, or one skill proficiency and your Thieves' Tools.
• Your PB is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies.

feat_rog_expertise_6.name: Expertise (Level 6)
feat_rog_expertise_6.description: Choose two more of your proficiencies (skills or Thieves' Tools) to gain the Expertise benefit.

feat_rog_sneak_attack.name: Sneak Attack
feat_rog_sneak_attack.description:
• Once per turn, you can deal extra damage to a creature you hit if you have Advantage on the attack roll.
• You don't need Advantage if another enemy of the target is within 1.5m of it.
• The attack must use a Finesse or Ranged weapon.

feat_rog_thieves_cant.name: Thieves' Cant
feat_rog_thieves_cant.description: You know a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code used to hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

feat_rog_cunning_action.name: Cunning Action
feat_rog_cunning_action.description: You can take a Bonus Action on each of your turns in combat to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

feat_rog_steady_aim.name: Steady Aim
feat_rog_steady_aim.description:
• As a Bonus Action, you gain Advantage on your next attack roll this turn.
• After you use it, your speed is 0 until the end of the turn.

feat_rog_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_rog_asi.description: Increase one score by 2, or two by 1, or take a Feat.

feat_rog_uncanny_dodge.name: Uncanny Dodge
feat_rog_uncanny_dodge.description: When an attacker you see hits you, use your Reaction to halve the damage.

feat_rog_evasion.name: Evasion
feat_rog_evasion.description: When you make a Dex Saving Throw for half damage, you take no damage on a success, and only half on a failure.

feat_rog_reliable_talent.name: Reliable Talent
feat_rog_reliable_talent.description: Treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10 for any proficiency check.

feat_rog_blindsense.name: Blindsense
feat_rog_blindsense.description: If you can hear, you are aware of hidden or Invisible creatures within 3 meters.

feat_rog_slippery_mind.name: Slippery Mind
feat_rog_slippery_mind.description: You gain proficiency in Wisdom Saving Throws.

feat_rog_elusive.name: Elusive
feat_rog_elusive.description: No attack roll has Advantage against you while you aren't Incapacitated.

feat_rog_stroke_luck.name: Stroke of Luck
feat_rog_stroke_luck.description:
• Turn a missed attack into a hit, or treat a failed ability check d20 as a 20.
• Regain use after a Short Rest or Long Rest.

feat_rog_archetype.name: Roguish Archetype
feat_rog_archetype.description: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype like Swashbuckler.

feat_swash_fancy_footwork.name: Fancy Footwork
feat_swash_fancy_footwork.description: If you make a melee attack, the target can't make opportunity attacks against you this turn.

feat_swash_rakish_audacity.name: Rakish Audacity
feat_swash_rakish_audacity.description:
• Add your Charisma modifier to Initiative.
• Use Sneak Attack if within 1.5m of the target and no other creatures are near you.

feat_swash_panache.name: Panache
feat_swash_panache.description: Use Persuasion vs Insight to charm non-hostiles or challenge hostiles.

feat_swash_elegant_maneuver.name: Elegant Maneuver
feat_swash_elegant_maneuver.description: Bonus Action to gain Advantage on next Acrobatics or Athletics check.

feat_swash_master_duelist.name: Master Duelist
feat_swash_master_duelist.description:
• Reroll a missed attack with Advantage.
• Regain use after a Short Rest or Long Rest.
